headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://apis.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none';
